rulings.Case Title: MAX SHIRRY-WYSS VS. NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 18, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement continued to May 6, 2020 on Court's own motion. If parties stipulate to a different hearing date after May 6, 2020, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on March 18, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER WITT ET AL VS. DENNIS E. OSTROW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 18, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANTs DENNIS OSTROW and THELMA LOUIE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Requests for Judicial Notice are granted. The facts surrounding the payment of the additional relocation are not in dispute and are discussed by both sides at length in their briefs. Written notice of entitlement to relocation payment under SFRO 37.9A(e)(3)(C) was provided to the landlord before the expiration of the operative Ellis Act Notice. No payment has been made within the time mandated by SFRO 37.9A(e)(3)(C). No authority is cited by the Plaintiff for the proposition that late payment "under protest" satisfies SFRO requirements. If the tentative ruling is contested, parties are encouraged to appear by telephone.= (501/REQ)
